text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Manhattan Cafe's debut race comes to a close,
and it seems like her friend remains far off in the
distance.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We still don't know how to bridge that distance.
For now, we can only press on while I try to
deepen my understanding of Manhattan Cafe.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
To close the huge gap standing between us and
her friend, we decide to take a slower approach
by focusing on training and racing.
